summary: Completed frontend testing of Document Preview Modal feature. All core functionality works correctly: modal opens with PDF content, zoom controls work (in/out/slider), page navigation works, fullscreen mode works, Download and New Tab buttons are enabled, close button returns to same page state. Modal has proper styling (white background, rounded corners).

accessibility_issues.issue: Missing DialogTitle and DialogDescription for screen reader accessibility
accessibility_issues.console_warning: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users
accessibility_issues.recommendation: Add visually hidden DialogTitle and DialogDescription components

passed_tests: Document Preview Modal opens when clicking View on policy with uploaded file
PDF content displays correctly with react-pdf library
Page count shows correctly (e.g., 'Page 1 of 38')
Next page navigation works (Page 1 → Page 2)
Previous page navigation works
Zoom in button works (100% → 125%)
Zoom out button works (125% → 100%)
Zoom slider is present and functional
Rotate button is present
Fullscreen mode works (modal expands to full viewport)
Exit fullscreen works (modal returns to normal size)
Download button is enabled and clickable
New Tab button is enabled and clickable
Close button (X) closes modal successfully
Page returns to same state after closing modal
Modal has white background (rgb(255, 255, 255))
Modal has rounded corners (12px border-radius)
Second policy (Medication Policy) also opens correctly in modal
File name and size displayed in modal header
File type (PDF) displayed correctly
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add DialogTitle and DialogDescription for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentPreviewModal.jsx Line 119: React Hook useEffect has missing dependency 'blobUrl' - this is intentional to prevent infinite loops but could be refactored
Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent should have DialogTitle for screen readers
seed_data_creation: Used existing policies with uploaded files (Safeguarding Adults Policy, Medication Policy)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Preview Modal feature is fully functional. Tested on Compliance Centre page with two policies that have uploaded files. Modal uses react-pdf library for PDF rendering. All controls work: zoom (in/out/slider), page navigation, fullscreen, download, new tab, close. Employee Profile Page integration could not be tested as there are no employees in the system - would need to create an employee with uploaded documents to test that flow.

pdf_viewer.zoom_controls: Zoom in/out buttons and slider work

action_buttons.close: Closes modal and returns to same page state
